essays:
$\text{MATRIX MULTIPLICATION:}$

$[1 \ 2] \quad [5 \ 6] \quad [19 \ 21]$

$[3 \ 4] \times [7 \ 8] = [43 \ 50]$

$\text{EACH VALUE COMES FROM A ROW DOTTED WITH A COLUMN, SO TOP-RIGHT}$

$\text{SHOULD BE } 1*6+2*8, \text{ TOP-LEFT IS } 1*5+2*7=19, \text{ AND THE BOTTOM ROW}$

$\text{FOLLOWS THE SAME PATTERN.}$

```latex
\text{CONVOLUTION (FILTER APPLIED TO IMAGE PATCH):} \\
\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\ 0 & -1 \end{bmatrix} * \begin{bmatrix} 4 & 5 \\ 6 & 7 \end{bmatrix} = -3 \\
\text{MULTIPLYING EACH FILTER VALUE BY THE PATCH VALUE BENEATH IT AND SUMMING} \\
\text{GIVES } 1 * 4 + 0 * 5 + 0 * 6 + -1 * 7 = -3.
```

```latex
\begin{verbatim}
DEF MULTIPLICATION_TABEL(N):
TABLE = []
FOR I IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
ROW = []
FOR J IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
ROW.APPEND(I * J)
\end{verbatim}
```
